name: Danavation Technologies Corp.
summary: Danavation Technologies Corp., an Internet of Things (IoT) technology company, provides micro e-paper displays to organizations across North America. The company's Digital Smart Labels enable companies across various sectors to automate labelling, price, product, and promotions in real-time. Danavation offers its solution to retailers, including big box and boutique grocers while also targeting new markets, including healthcare providers, manufacturing, and logistics companies. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is based in Toronto, Canada.
